title: knowltonia daucifolia
intro: Knowltonia daucifolia, also known as the wild carrot, is a plant species that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Knowltonia daucifolia include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and relieve respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat various health conditions.
